1885350.name: Camp Palut Demo
1885350.description:
Welcome to the demo for Camp Palut!

This demo is essentially the "common route" of the game, allowing you to meet the characters and get to know them. This is more or less what the beginning of Camp Palut will look like. There will be some minor changes and additions as well as additional accessibility features in the full release. The full game will also have the love interest routes and endings!
